notes: Applied to every endpoint/IPC channel/RPC in inventories/api-endpoint.json.

steps.title: Implement {name} handler
steps.description: Implement {name} at {path} per 03-TARGET-ARCHITECTURE.md seam contracts; pure handler logic separated from transport.

steps.title: Input validation and typed errors for {name}
steps.description: Schema-validate all inputs to {name}; reject with typed errors from the project error taxonomy; never leak internals in messages.
acceptance_criteria: malformed input rejected with typed error
no unhandled exception for any fuzzed input shape

steps.title: AuthN/AuthZ enforcement on {name}
steps.description: Enforce authentication and least-privilege authorization on {name}; deny by default; audit-log privileged use.
acceptance_criteria: unauthenticated and under-privileged calls rejected in tests

steps.title: Timeout/retry/idempotency semantics for {name}
steps.description: Define and implement timeout budget, retry/backoff policy (or explicit no-retry), and idempotency behavior for {name}; document the decision in code.
acceptance_criteria: duplicate delivery does not corrupt state
timeout path returns typed error within budget

steps.title: Unit tests for {name}
steps.description: Unit-test {name}: happy path, each typed error, boundary values.

steps.title: Integration tests for {name}
steps.description: Integration-test {name} against real transport and storage (test instance), including authz and failure injection.
acceptance_criteria: green against real seams in CI
failure injection produces typed errors, not crashes

steps.title: Latency/load budget for {name}
steps.description: Benchmark {name} against its 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md latency budget at expected P95 load; fix N+1s and unbounded queries.
acceptance_criteria: P95 within budget on baseline infra

steps.title: Telemetry for {name}
steps.description: Emit area/severity/context telemetry for every real failure of {name}; breadcrumb the request lifecycle; no silent catches.

steps.title: API docs for {name}
steps.description: Document {name}: contract, error codes, idempotency and retry semantics, examples.
